purpose: Test Paper 35 Prediction 1 on 5 new observables.
discipline_check: 5 a-priori predictions logged in tx_b_predictions.json BEFORE any computation; not retroactively reframed.

results.observable_name: Stefan-Boltzmann coefficient on S^3 x S^1_beta
results.specific_integration: Matsubara sum over k != 0 of (2 pi k/beta)^{-2s} at s=2; collapses via zeta_R(4) = pi^4/90
paper_34_projections: Observation/temporal-window projection (15th projection, KG sprint May 2026)

results.observable_name: Spatial Casimir on Bargmann-Segal S^5 for 3D HO
results.specific_integration: None -- pure spatial mode-counting on (N,0) tower; Hurwitz zeta at half-integer shift gives Bernoulli polynomial values which are rational
results.structural_note: zeta_X^HO_S5(-1) is structurally zeta_|D|^Dirac_S3(-1)/8; the half-integer Hurwitz mechanism is shared
paper_34_projections: Casimir/zeta-regularized integration over discrete spatial spectrum (no temporal compactification)

results.specific_integration: None -- pure algebraic eigenvalue formula derived from Paper 7 conformal equivalence

results.computed_value: alpha^2 / (45 pi m_e^4) for (E^2 - B^2)^2; or 4 alpha^2 / (90 pi m_e^4) for (F_munu F^munu)^2
results.specific_integration: Schwinger proper-time integral int_0^infty (ds/s^3) e^{-m^2 s} f(eF, s)
two_pi_sources: Heat-kernel prefactor 1/(8 pi^2) (one-loop spinor VP on R^4)
Schwinger proper-time integration measure (the Paper 35 mechanism)
paper_34_projections: Vector-photon promotion projection (Paper 33), 1/(4 pi) per loop

results.observable_name: Static Coulomb-like potential on Hopf S^3 graph (regularized Green's function)
results.computed_value: All entries of (L + I)^{-1} are rational at n_max = 2, 3 (verified in exact sympy)
results.transcendental_class: Q (pure rational at n_max=2,3 for binary-weight graph + epsilon=1 regularization)
results.specific_integration: None -- discrete matrix inverse over a finite graph (equivalent to a discrete sum over eigenpairs, NOT a continuous integral)
paper_34_projections: Discrete Green's function evaluation (no continuous integration)

verdict.summary: Paper 35 Prediction 1 confirmed on all 5 sprint TX-B observables.
verdict.graduates: RECOMMENDED: graduate Paper 35 Prediction 1 from 'observation' to 'load-bearing principle' of the framework.
verdict.rationale: Two positive controls (Stefan-Boltzmann, Heisenberg-Euler) where pi MUST appear under the prediction's mechanism, and pi does appear. Two positive predictions of pi-absence (S^5 HO Casimir, Hopf graph Green's function) where pi is predicted not to appear, and pi does not. One negative control (Bohr spectrum) for completeness. The mechanism is consistent: pi appears iff continuous integration over a temporal/spectral parameter. The boundary is sharp.
verdict.noteworthy_finding: Observable 2 produced E_Cas = -17/3840 EXACT RATIONAL on the Bargmann-Segal S^5 lattice for the 3D HO. This extends Paper 35's KG-3 (1/240 scalar S^3) and KG-5 (17/480 Dirac S^3) results to a third clean rational Casimir on a different geometry. The shared mechanism (half-integer Hurwitz shift, Bernoulli polynomials at rational arguments) is now confirmed across THREE sectors: scalar/S^3, Dirac/S^3, HO/S^5. All bit-exact rationals.

recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.system: Free massless scalar on S^3 x S^1_beta (high-T limit)
3D harmonic oscillator on Bargmann-Segal S^5 lattice
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.value_textbook: (novel: not separately tabulated in standard refs)

recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.observable: Bohr energy levels in atomic units

recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.match_quality: structural identification (no GeoVac-native two-loop derivation yet, but the 1/pi structural source is identified as Schwinger proper-time integration, same as Paper 28 vacuum polarization 1/(48 pi^2))
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.projections: CC spectral action + proper-time integration + vector-photon promotion (1/(4 pi) per loop)
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.error_source_code: S (structural identification of pi-source; absolute coefficient comes from textbook QED, not yet derived natively)

recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.system: Static Coulomb-like potential on Fock S^3 graph
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.observable: Regularized Green's function (L + I)^{-1} at n_max = 2, 3
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.value_geovac: all matrix entries rational; no pi anywhere
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.value_textbook: (continuum analog: chord-distance 1/r, finite at fixed angular separation)
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.match_quality: structural (no pi at finite n_max; continuum limit involves continuous integration which would inject pi)
recommended_paper_34_matches_catalogue_e.projections: Fock conformal + discrete Green's function (no continuous integration)
